title: Whaleborne planks compat
body:
This datapack + resource pack allows you to use some modded planks as an armor for Hullback mob from Whaleborne. Currently datapack includes woodsets from next mods:
1. Alex caves
2. Jaden's Nether expansion
3. ALL of Abnormals mods
4. Windswept
5. Vanilla Backport
6. Arts and Crafts
7. Sully's mod

Alex caves pewen, thornwood and JNE claret has unique textures for the armor making their appearance fit with the woodset that it belongs to.

!!!NOTE!!! 
To make this datapack work you must put the foulder both in datapacks and resourcepacks.

Enjoy!
